# GitHub Copilot Starter

Set up repository-level Copilot assets:

- `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/*.instructions.md`
- `.github/skills/*/SKILL.md`
- `.github/agents/*.agent.md`
- `.github/mcp-config.json`
- `hooks.json` + hook scripts

## Rules

- Reuse existing awesome-copilot templates where applicable.
- Keep generated files production-ready and aligned with stack constraints.
- Prefer explicit conventions over generic advice.
